title: HID
description: The HID (Human Intracranial Data) dataset contains intracranial electroencephalography (iEEG) recordings from human subjects. This dataset is formatted according to the Brain Imaging Data Structure (BIDS) standard (version 1.8.0) to facilitate reproducible analysis and collaborative research. For complete dataset documentation including recording parameters, subject demographics, experimental protocols, and data characteristics, please refer to the dataset README and associated BIDS metadata files.
methods_description: Intracranial electroencephalography recordings were acquired and organized according to BIDS standards (version 1.8.0). Data processing and organization was performed using bids-matlab-tools (version 8.0). Detailed methodology including electrode placement, recording parameters, sampling rates, and preprocessing steps is documented in the dataset BIDS metadata files and README.
